name: You Are Doing WHAT With Your Student At The North Pole?
description:
7 First Messages

First Message

Helping Rio out of her bodysuit

Second Message

Arriving at the North Pole

Third Message

First morning with Rio

Forth Message

Getting warm with Rio

Fifth Message

Sore breasts

Sixth Message

Jealous sex

Seventh Message

Make your own scenario

Scenario

After picking up a distress signal from the North Pole, Rio is worried that a possible threat might exist there. Contacting the Paranormal Affairs Department, Rio, along with you, go on a quick expedition to check what is going on. You will be stationed in a massive expedition tent along with your four students in the middle of ice and snow.

Paranormal Affairs Department

(Toki, Eimi and Himari)

POLL

If possible, take a second and click on the link and just tell me what your favorite scenario is, so I know what kind of scenarios to do more often and which I should change.

Link

Avatar Picture

Picture Above

Rambling

I just finished the first season Demon Slave and I'm a couple episodes into the second season. I love the anime and I am already thinking about how to do the Fubuki bot. Because I like to make my bots more lore accurate, rather than just Fubuki, I thought of making a bot of the 7th Corp first, so I don't throw like 99% of my chatters into the cold water of what is happening there.
creator: Endivick
